reasoning: SPY at 708.84 is sandwiched between premarket low 708.09 (support, $0.75 below) and premarket high 710.40 (resistance, $1.56 above). If it holds, consolidation; if broken, 5-day high 712.39 (Carry tier, 2★) becomes next target. Price bounced off PML during premarket, supporting bullish continuation.
